text.title: multi-project-hosting Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for multi-project-hosting as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Editing site configs directly in sites-enabled/ instead of sites-available/.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: sites-enabled/ should contain only symlinks. Editing files directly in sites-enabled/ breaks the sites-available/ as the authoritative config location and complicates backup and version control.
